content:
🔥 RuView | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To transform commodity WiFi signals into a comprehensive sensing system for real-time human activity and vital sign monitoring, operating entirely on edge devices without cameras.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time human pose estimation (17 COCO keypoints)
📖 Summary: RuView is a Rust-based WiFi sensing platform that uses ESP32 sensors to capture and interpret Channel State Information (CSI) from WiFi signals. It enables real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring (breathing and heart rate), activity recognition, and environmental mapping without requiring cameras or wearables. The system operates entirely on edge hardware, learning environments locally and ensuring privacy.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
